finding: `next --claim --auto-intent` can classify a task as `closeout-only` even when the agent is about to make source or backlog delivery changes, causing pre-commit to fail later with `ATM_PRE_COMMIT_CLOSEOUT_ONLY_CLAIM_MUTATION`.
expectedBehavior: Auto-intent should infer write intent when the task is open and delivery files are modified or when the prompt asks to implement/fix, or `git commit --task` should surface the re-claim command before staging and hook failure.
evidenceOrRepro: During `TASK-AAO-0151`, the first claim reported `claimIntent: closeout-only`; `node atm.mjs git commit --auto-stage` then failed after running hooks because `docs/governance/atm-bug-and-optimization-backlog.md` and `packages/cli/src/commands/next.ts` were real delivery mutations. On 2026-07-09 this was closed by adding `ATM_GIT_COMMIT_CLOSEOUT_ONLY_MUTATION` to task-scoped commit bundle preflight, so source mutation under an active closeout-only claim fails before auto-stage and before long pre-commit hooks.
followUp: Keep `tests/cli/git-commit-closeout-only-preflight.test.ts` in `validate:cli`; it asserts the source file is not staged and the operator receives the re-claim/write recovery path.
